case_title: WESTERN WATER CONSTRUCTORS, INC. et al VS. JULIO BORRUSO et al

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF WROTE IN A REQUEST TO POSTPONE FORM THAT HE WAS "NOT" ABLE TO SERVE DEFENDANT (SHOULD BE "RESET"). FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN WATER CONSTRUCTORS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTERN WATER CONSTRUCTORS, INC. MCGARVA, ELI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORRUSO, JULIO BORRUSO, ANGELITA $2,258.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,558.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT JULIO BORRUSO RE REQUEST TO PLAINTIFF TO ACCEPT MONTHLY PAYMENTS.
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-28-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-07-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN WATER CONSTRUCTORS, INC. MCGARVA, ELI AS TO DEFENDANT BORRUSO, JULIO BORRUSO, ANGELITA

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $329.20 - REMAINING DEFICIT $ 2494.60 - AS TO DEFENDANT BORRUSO, JULIO BORRUSO, ANGELITA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2012 - JUDGMENT.
